name: Tostada Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, milk, and oil. Stir until the mixture cleans the sides of the bowl.
3. Press the dough into a ball and knead in the bowl for 10 times.
4. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured board to a 13-inch circle.
5. Place the rolled-out dough on a pizza pan or baking sheet. Turn up the edges and pinch them together.
6. Bake for 5 minutes.
7. Prepare the ground beef according to the recommendations in your seasoning mix.
8. Spread refried beans over the crust.
9. Top with meat mixture.
10. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the top.
11. Bake for an additional 2 minutes longer.
12. Top the pizza with taco sauce, chopped green chiles, onion, tomatoes, and shredded lettuce.
Serves eight
